/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Timber.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Timber.dir/code/Timber.cpp.o -o bin/Timber  -Wl,-rpath,/home/logandev/Classwork/Lab_4_15/build/_deps/sfml-build/lib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.2 _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-audio.so.2.6.2 _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.so.2.6.2 _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.so.2.6.2
